title: CSAR

antagonist_concept.name: Bounchanh Vorasak
antagonist_concept.core_threat: A Pathet Lao provincial commander who controls the territory around the crash site and hunts the downed pilot to exploit the intelligence value of captured American aircrew.

supporting_cast_needs.narrative_function: Senior PJ and mentor who models the creed under fire and serves as Archer's moral compass.
supporting_cast_needs.name: Silas Vance

supporting_cast_needs.narrative_function: The downed CIA contract pilot whose survival drives the rescue mission and whose injuries raise the stakes.
supporting_cast_needs.name: Tom Coyle

supporting_cast_needs.narrative_function: Helicopter aircraft commander who flies the extraction under fire and embodies institutional calm.
supporting_cast_needs.name: Jack Dalton

supporting_cast_needs.narrative_function: NVA intelligence officer who represents the strategic-level threat and escalates pressure on Bounchanh's pursuit.
supporting_cast_needs.name: Tran Van Khoa

book_subtext: The cost of earning the right to say 'that others may live' — a two-year initiation compressed into one mission.
